reviews.review_description: So I’m actually an admin in this game and don’t listen to all the people that have the Internet connections. It’s because that was the old game. It was broken but now it’s fixed so get the game now. ￼

They have to fix the internet connection with the game and they are putting five stars bc they are they ones the made the game and the real people are putting 1 ⭐so it is real. People are false reporting and mean

Even though I was the only one in the game, I still loved it though when you have some of the mods on, you have like a long neck and you can see your head which is a glitch that needs to be fixed but overall the game is very nice and the owners or admin. Whoever has access to the game needs to update the Discord button because it said it was expired. Also, can I have mod stick please. I would also recommend adding platform mod if you can. overall good game ￼
It says that i have to wifi connected if this gets fixed i will rate it 5 stars
Cant even get in the game
